terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Terms of Service

s1.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.p1: Welcome to The Bliss Massage at Home. By using our services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and accepted all of these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any of these terms, please do not use our services.
s1.p2: These Terms of Service govern the use of the entire online platform, application, and at-home spa services, including the handling of personal data, payments, and the various rights of service users.

s2.heading: 2. Registration and User Accounts
s2.li1: You must be at least 18 years of age.
s2.li2: The information you provide must be accurate, complete, and current.
s2.li3: You must keep your password and account information confidential.
s2.li4: You must not use a username that is inappropriate, offensive, or infringes upon the rights of others.
s2.p2: You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account. If you discover any unauthorized use of your account, please notify us immediately.
s2.p3: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if we find any violation of the Terms of Service or any inappropriate conduct.

s3.heading: 3. Use of Services
s3.p1: The Bliss Massage at Home provides at-home spa and massage services through an online platform on which users can:
s3.li1: Browse and select a variety of spa services
s3.li2: Book appointments and choose convenient time slots
s3.li6: A booking becomes valid only when confirmed by the system.
s3.li7: Please book at least 24 hours in advance.
s3.li8: You must provide accurate address and contact information.
s3.li9: You must notify us in advance of any underlying medical conditions or special health circumstances.
s3.li10: Use the services for any unlawful or inappropriate purpose
s3.li11: Disrupt or interfere with the operation of the system
s3.li13: Copy, modify, or reproduce any of our content without authorization
s3.li14: Use automated systems or bots to book services

s4.heading: 4. Pricing and Payment
s4.li1: The prices displayed are starting prices and are subject to change.
s4.li2: Prices do not include special travel surcharges for remote areas.
s4.li4: We reserve the right to change prices without prior notice.
s4.li8: Cash (paid upon receiving the service - for regular customers only)
s4.p3: Refunds will be processed within 7-14 business days in the following cases:
s4.li9: The service does not match what was advertised
s4.li10: The therapist fails to arrive at the appointed time without prior notice
s4.li11: The service quality is clearly below standard

s5.heading: 5. Cancellation and Booking Changes

li1.label: Cancellation more than 24 hours in advance:

li2.label: Cancellation more than 12 hours in advance:

li3.label: Cancellation less than 12 hours in advance:

li4.label: No Show:
li4.text: No refund and may result in a temporary suspension of service

s5.p2: If we must cancel a booking due to force majeure (such as therapist illness or an accident), we will:
s5.li5: Notify you as soon as possible
s5.li6: Offer a new booking at an alternative time
s5.li7: Or provide a full refund within 7 business days

s6.heading: 6. Liability and Limitations
s6.p1: We make every effort to provide quality service, but we cannot guarantee individual-specific results. The outcome of a service may vary depending on each individual's physical condition and health.
s6.p2: We shall not be liable for:
s6.li1: Injuries arising from the concealment of health information
s6.p3: All of our therapists are covered by accident and personal liability insurance. If an accident occurs during service, we will process the insurance claim in accordance with the established procedure.

s7.heading: 7. Intellectual Property
s7.p1: All content on this platform, including text, images, logos, icons, and software, is the property of The Bliss Massage at Home or its licensors and is protected under intellectual property law.
s7.p2: You may not copy, reproduce, distribute, or use it for commercial purposes without our prior written permission.

s8.heading: 8. Privacy
s8.p1pre: The collection, use, and disclosure of your personal data shall be in accordance with our Privacy Policy. Please read the
s8.p1post: to understand how we handle your information.

s9.heading: 9. Changes to the Terms
s9.p1: We reserve the right to amend or change these Terms of Service at any time. Changes take effect immediately upon publication on the website.
s9.p2: We will notify you of any material changes via email or platform notification. Continued use of the services constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

s10.heading: 10. Governing Law
s10.p1: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Thailand.
s10.p2: Any dispute arising out of or in connection with these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Thailand.

s11.heading: 11. Contact Us
s11.p1: If you have any questions or concerns regarding these Terms of Service, please contact us at:

terms.footer: Thank you for using The Bliss Massage at Home - relaxation and happiness are what we care about.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Privacy Policy
privacy.importantText: The Bliss Massage at Home values the privacy and security of your data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

s1.heading: 1. Information We Collect
s1.p1: When you register and use our services, we collect the following information:

li1.label: Personal information:
li1.text: Full name, email, phone number, date of birth, gender

li3.label: Health information:
li3.text: Underlying medical conditions, allergy history, health limitations (for safety)

li5.label: Profile picture:
li5.text: If you choose to upload one

s1.p2: When you use our platform, we may collect the following information automatically:

li7.label: Usage information:
li7.text: Pages visited, time spent, clicks, search history

li9.label: Cookies:
li9.text: See details in the "Cookies and Tracking Technologies" section

li10.label: Social media:
li10.text: If you sign in with Google or Facebook

li11.label: Business partners:
li11.text: Such as payment systems, identity verification services

s2.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
s2.li3: Dispatch a therapist to your address
s2.li4: Communicate with you regarding bookings and services
s2.li5: Provide customer service and resolve issues
s2.li6: Analyze usage behavior to improve our services
s2.li10: Send news, promotions, and special offers (with your consent)
s2.li15: Act on court orders or government authorities
s2.li16: Protect the rights and safety of ourselves and others

s3.heading: 3. Disclosure and Sharing of Information
s3.h1: 3.1 Persons with Whom We May Share Information

li1.label: Therapist:
li1.text: Information necessary for service provision (name, address, phone number, health information)

s3.h2: 3.2 Cases in Which We May Disclose Information

li6.label: With consent:
li6.text: When you authorize us to disclose information

li7.label: By law:
li7.text: When requested by a court order or law enforcement authority

li8.label: Protecting rights:
li8.text: To protect the rights, property, or safety of ourselves or others

li9.label: Sale of business:
li9.text: In the event of a merger or sale of assets

s3.p3: Your information may be stored and processed in Thailand or other countries where we have service providers. We will ensure that your information is protected in accordance with international standards.

s4.heading: 4. Data Security
s4.li1: SSL/TLS data encryption for data transmission
s4.li2: Encryption of data stored in the database
s4.p1: Although we use appropriate security measures, no system is 100% secure. If you notice any suspicious behavior, please notify us immediately.
s4.li6: Use a strong password that is not reused for other services
s4.li8: Do not share your password with others
s4.li9: Log out when you finish using the service, especially on public devices
s4.li10: Beware of phishing emails or messages

s5.heading: 5. Your Rights under the Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562 (PDPA)
s5.p1: You have various rights to manage your personal data, as follows:
s5.p1text: You may request access to and obtain a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
s5.p2text: You may request the correction or update of information that is inaccurate or incomplete.
s5.p3text: You may request that we delete your information, except where we are required to retain it by law.
s5.p4text: You may request that we restrict the use of your information in certain cases.
s5.p5text: You may request to receive your information in a machine-readable format, or request that we transfer your information to another data controller.
s5.p6text: You may object to the processing of your information, such as direct marketing.
s5.p7text: You may withdraw the consent you have given at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing already carried out.
s5.howToText: If you wish to exercise any of the above rights, please contact us at privacy@theblissathome.com or through our customer relations channels. We will respond within 30 days.

s6.heading: 6. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
s6.p1: Cookies are small files that a website stores on your device to remember settings and improve your user experience.

li1.label: Necessary cookies:
li1.text: Necessary for the operation of the website (such as storing login status)

li2.label: Analytics cookies:
li2.text: Help us understand how users interact with the website

li4.label: Personalization cookies:
li4.text: Remember your settings, such as language

s6.p3: You may control or delete cookies as you wish through your browser settings. However, disabling certain types of cookies may affect the functioning of the website.

s7.heading: 7. Data Retention
s7.p1: We will retain your personal data only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes set out in this policy, or as required by law.

li1.label: Active account data:
li1.text: Retained for as long as the account remains active

li2.label: Transaction data:
li2.text: At least 5 years (in accordance with tax law)

s8.heading: 8. Children and Minors
s8.p1: Our services are not directed at children under 18 years of age. We do not intentionally collect personal data directly from children.
s8.p2: If you are a parent or guardian and believe that your child has provided personal data to us, please contact us so that we may delete that information.

s9.heading: 9. Changes to This Policy
s9.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in laws, practices, or our services.
s9.p2: We will notify you of significant changes via email or notifications on the platform. Continued use of the services after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new policy.

s10.heading: 10. Contacting the Data Protection Officer
s10.p1: If you have any questions, concerns, or wish to exercise your rights under the PDPA, please contact:
s10.company: The Bliss Massage at Home Co., Ltd.
s10.responseNote: We will endeavor to respond to your request within 30 days. If more time is required, we will notify you.

s11.heading: 11. Complaints
s11.p1: If you are not satisfied with our response regarding your personal data, you have the right to file a complaint with:
s11.office: Office of the Personal Data Protection Committee

footer.heading: Our Commitment to Privacy
footer.text: The Bliss Massage at Home is committed to protecting your privacy and your data. We will use your information responsibly and transparently. If you have any questions or need further information, please contact us at any time.
